mapper.select: SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID, H.NAME, H.PHONE, H.ADDR, H.LAT, H.LNG, H.AVG_RATING, H.REVIEW_CNT, H.TAG_LIST, (SELECT F.FILE_URL FROM TB_FILE F WHERE F.REF_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND F.REF_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_HOSPITAL H WHERE H.STATUS_CD IN ('ACTIVE', 'NORMAL') ORDER BY H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC

SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID, H.NAME, H.PHONE, H.ADDR, H.LAT, H.LNG, H.AVG_RATING, H.REVIEW_CNT, H.TAG_LIST, (SELECT F.FILE_URL FROM TB_FILE F WHERE F.REF_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND F.REF_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_HOSPITAL H WHERE H.STATUS_CD IN ('ACTIVE', 'NORMAL')
AND (H.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR H.ADDR LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND H.TAG_LIST LIKE '%' || #{tagFilter} || '%'
AND H.TAG_LIST LIKE '%' || #{target} || '%'
ORDER BY NVL(H.AVG_RATING, 0) DESC, H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC
ORDER BY NVL(H.REVIEW_CNT, 0) DESC, H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC
ORDER BY H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC

SELECT HOSPITAL_ID, BIZ_NO, MEMBER_NO, NAME, PHONE, ADDR, ADDR_DETAIL AS addrDetail, LAT, LNG, AVG_RATING, REVIEW_CNT, STATUS_CD, APPROVE_DATE, HOURS_JSON, TAG_LIST FROM TB_HOSPITAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}

SELECT P.PET_ID AS petId, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS species, P.BREED AS breed, P.AGE AS age FROM TB_PET P WHERE P.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NVL(P.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY P.IS_REPRESENT DESC, P.PET_ID ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_RESERVATION.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_RESERVATION ( RESV_ID, RESV_NO, RESV_TYPE, MEMBER_NO, PET_ID, TARGET_ID, RESV_DATE, RESV_TIME, TREAT_TYPE_ID, DURATION_MIN, END_TIME, DOCTOR_ID, SYMPTOMS, REQUEST_MEMO, STATUS_CD, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{resvId}, #{resvNo}, #{resvType}, #{memberNo}, #{petId}, #{targetId}, #{resvDate}, #{resvTime}, #{treatTypeId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{durationMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doctorId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{symptoms, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestMemo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusCd}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, TYPE_NAME AS typeName, DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, SORT_ORDR AS sortOrdr, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND TREAT_TYPE_ID = #{treatTypeId}

SELECT DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, SPECIALTY AS specialty, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, SORT_ORDR AS sortOrdr, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND DOCTOR_ID = #{doctorId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION R WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.DOCTOR_ID = #{doctorId} AND R.RESV_DATE >= TRUNC(#{resvDate}) AND R.RESV_DATE < TRUNC(#{resvDate}) + 1 AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED') AND R.RESV_TIME < #{endTime} AND NVL( R.END_TIME, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(R.RESV_TIME, 'HH24:MI') + NUMTODSINTERVAL(NVL(R.DURATION_MIN, 30), 'MINUTE'), 'HH24:MI' ) ) > #{resvTime}

SELECT TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, TYPE_NAME AS typeName, DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, SORT_ORDR AS sortOrdr, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_TREAT_TYPE WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND NVL(STATUS_CD, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDR, 9999), TREAT_TYPE_ID

SELECT DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, DOCTOR_NAME AS doctorName, SPECIALTY AS specialty, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, SORT_ORDR AS sortOrdr, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_DOCTOR WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND NVL(STATUS_CD, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDR, 9999), DOCTOR_ID

SELECT E.EXC_ID AS excId, E.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, E.DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, E.EXC_DATE AS excDate, E.EXC_TYPE AS excType, E.START_TIME AS startTime, E.END_TIME AS endTime, E.INTERVAL_MIN AS intervalMin, E.MEMO AS memo, E.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, E.REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_EXCEPTION E WHERE E.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND E.EXC_DATE >= TRUNC(#{resvDate}) AND E.EXC_DATE < TRUNC(#{resvDate}) + 1 AND NVL(E.STATUS_CD, 'Y') = 'Y'

SELECT R.RESV_TIME AS startTime, NVL( R.END_TIME, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(R.RESV_TIME, 'HH24:MI') + NUMTODSINTERVAL(NVL(R.DURATION_MIN, 30), 'MINUTE'), 'HH24:MI' ) ) AS endTime, NULL AS holdId FROM TB_RESERVATION R WHERE R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = TO_CHAR(#{hospitalId}) AND R.DOCTOR_ID = #{doctorId} AND R.RESV_DATE >= TRUNC(#{resvDate}) AND R.RESV_DATE < TRUNC(#{resvDate}) + 1 AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED')

SELECT H.RESV_TIME AS startTime, H.END_TIME AS endTime, H.HOLD_ID AS holdId FROM TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_HOLD H WHERE H.HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId} AND H.DOCTOR_ID = #{doctorId} AND H.RESV_DATE >= TRUNC(#{resvDate}) AND H.RESV_DATE < TRUNC(#{resvDate}) + 1 AND H.EXPIRE_DATE > SYSDATE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_HOLD WHERE EXPIRE_DATE <= SYSDATE
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(HOLD_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_HOLD
INSERT INTO TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_HOLD ( HOLD_ID, HOSPITAL_ID, DOCTOR_ID, TREAT_TYPE_ID, MEMBER_NO, RESV_DATE, RESV_TIME, DURATION_MIN, END_TIME, EXPIRE_DATE, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{holdId}, #{hospitalId}, #{doctorId}, #{treatTypeId}, #{memberNo}, #{resvDate}, #{resvTime}, #{durationMin}, #{endTime}, #{expireDate}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT HOLD_ID AS holdId, HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, RESV_DATE AS resvDate, RESV_TIME AS resvTime, DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, END_TIME AS endTime, EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_HOSPITAL_RESV_HOLD WHERE HOLD_ID = #{holdId} AND EXPIRE_DATE > SYSDATE

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.TREAT_TYPE_ID AS treatTypeId, R.DURATION_MIN AS durationMin, R.END_TIME AS endTime, R.DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, P.AGE AS petAge, H.NAME AS hospitalName FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL H ON H.HOSPITAL_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) WHERE R.RESV_ID = #{resvId}

SELECT R.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RATING AS rating, R.CONTENT AS content, R.BIZ_REPLY AS bizReply, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies FROM TB_REVIEW R JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN TB_RESERVATION RV ON RV.RESV_ID = R.RESV_ID LEFT JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = RV.PET_ID WHERE R.REVIEW_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND R.TARGET_ID = #{hospitalId} ORDER BY R.REG_DATE DESC, R.REVIEW_ID DESC
